enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on June 5, 2014, recapping his week: visiting his mom, passing his motorcycle license test, getting high with his roommate, and considering weekend plans including riding his new motorcycle and working on his website. He also mentions watching The Young Turks and Cenk Uygur videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Easy for him personally but understandably hard for others due to tight cone spacing
Highly recommends watching; praises the information density of the content

So I can do some serious damage on a 4-day weekend on my website.
